_comment: Act 4 / Challenge 4.1 — The Server Room (boss-tier combat, 3 waves). Loaded by beacon at /spiffs/challenge_4_1.json.

wave_intros.1: Watchdog Process Alpha — UPS power-monitoring daemon. Defeat it to force a generator failover.
wave_intros.2: Watchdog Process Beta — hot-aisle thermal runaway detector. Cool it down, champ.
wave_intros.3: Watchdog Process Gamma — the final hardened guardian. The server logs the killing blow. Fight dirty, champ.

beacon.label: DEEPDISH Data Center
beacon.landmark: Loop Colo — 350 E Cermak (framing landmark, not the literal location)

capabilities.note: Combat is server-authoritative; the server resolves and records every wave including the final kill. A badge may attach optional onion.secure_random entropy. No badge signing (onion.se_sign does not exist).
